---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
format: html
author: Ann Holmes
---

# Lobster Analysis

## Setup

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```

## Load data

```{r}
lobster_traps <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data", "Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")) %>% 
    janitor::clean_names()
```
